creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 194510
About New Moon (dialogue)

$ grep -i moon /usr/local/share/applications/palemoon.desktop | grep New
$ grep -i moon /usr/local/share/applications/palemoon.desktop | grep Pale
Name=Pale Moon
$ 

$ palemoon --version
Moonchild Productions Pale Moon 27.9.3
$

Alt-F2 seeking 'New Moon' does not find the application, if the application is not running. 

… and so on (not digging, just cursory observations). 

----

For consistency with the name of the application, some adjustments may be desirable. Just enough to satisfy concerned individuals. 

Thanks
